title: South Korean manufacturer SK Hynix debuts on Nasdaq with a rise of up to 16%
summary: The world's largest memory chip maker began trading on Wall Street with a strong revaluation, marking the biggest foreign debut on the US stock exchange.

title: US and Iran show willingness to resume negotiations as tensions rise in the Middle East
summary: Despite threats, both sides hint at possible dialogues, while oil surpasses $76 and markets react to the crisis.

summary: Analysts debate the real impact of AI on corporate earnings and the chip sector, as investors adjust their expectations.

summary: Shares of the tech company rise sharply after Zuckerberg's statements on AI costs and analyst support.

title: Meta removes its AI image feature on Instagram after privacy criticism

summary: The Chinese fast-fashion giant gets the green light from Beijing to start its initial public offering, paving the way for its listing.

summary: US indices rose slightly in a session marked by the chipmaker's debut and gains from Meta and Sandisk.

summary: The Federal Reserve governor stated he will not give in to political demands to reduce rates, in a message of central bank independence.

title: Analysts debate whether to buy ServiceNow shares before July 22

title: A stock with a history of growing dividends goes unnoticed, and experts recommend buying it

title: Zoom CEO sells shares worth $5.1 million: a warning sign for investors?
summary: The sale of shares by the CEO raises doubts about confidence in the company's future.

summary: The US bank shows that its AI algorithms achieve better returns than the traditional investment strategy.

summary: The Spanish index partially cut losses thanks to the performance of some stocks, but geopolitical uncertainty weighed on the market.

summary: Shares of cybersecurity companies fall in a day of general weakness in the tech sector.
